commonSeoMistakesBanner.alt: Report highlighting common SEO mistakes made by Fort Myers law firms, including technical SEO, content, and local search issues.
commonSeoMistakesBanner.title: Common SEO Mistakes Fort Myers Law Firms Make
commonSeoMistakesBanner.description: Professional legal SEO report illustrating the most common mistakes that limit law firm search visibility, including poor local SEO, thin content, technical website issues, weak backlinks, and lack of mobile optimization. The visual emphasizes strategies for improving rankings, website traffic, and client acquisition.
commonSeoMistakesBanner.caption: Avoiding common SEO mistakes helps Fort Myers law firms improve search rankings, increase website traffic, and attract more qualified clients.

technicalAuditStepImage.alt: SEO-optimized legal content editor for a personal injury law firm with keyword analysis, content structure, and optimization score.
technicalAuditStepImage.title: Legal Content Development for Law Firm SEO
technicalAuditStepImage.description: Professional legal content development interface showcasing SEO-optimized service page creation for a personal injury law firm. The visual highlights keyword optimization, content structure, metadata, and on-page SEO best practices that improve search rankings, increase organic traffic, and attract qualified legal clients.
technicalAuditStepImage.caption: Strategic legal content development helps law firms improve search visibility, strengthen authority, and generate more qualified client leads through SEO.

onPageOptimizationStepImage.alt: Personal injury law firm appearing at the top of local Google search results for high-intent legal service searches.
onPageOptimizationStepImage.title: Personal Injury Lawyer Local Search Visibility
onPageOptimizationStepImage.description: Professional illustration showing a personal injury law firm ranking prominently in Google local search results. The visual highlights how local SEO helps attorneys reach high-intent clients, increase online visibility, build trust through strong rankings, and generate more qualified case inquiries.
onPageOptimizationStepImage.caption: Local SEO helps personal injury law firms appear when high-intent clients search for legal representation nearby.

offPageStrategyStepImage.alt: Professional personal injury law firm website with client reviews, consultation form, and mobile contact options
offPageStrategyStepImage.title: Personal Injury Law Firm Website for Client Lead Generation
offPageStrategyStepImage.description: Modern personal injury law firm website showcasing attorney profiles, client testimonials, online consultation forms, and mobile contact features. The visual demonstrates how a professional, conversion-focused website builds trust, improves user experience, and generates qualified legal leads.
offPageStrategyStepImage.caption: A professional law firm website with reviews and easy contact options helps convert visitors into qualified personal injury clients.

analyticsReportingStepImage.alt: Law firm ranking at the top of Google search results for a high-intent personal injury lawyer keyword in Fort Myers.
analyticsReportingStepImage.title: Legal Intent Keywords Drive Higher SEO Returns
analyticsReportingStepImage.description: Professional illustration of a law firm's top Google search result for a high-intent personal injury keyword. The visual demonstrates how targeting legal intent search queries improves organic visibility, attracts qualified prospects, increases click-through rates, and delivers stronger SEO return on investment.
analyticsReportingStepImage.caption: High-intent legal keywords connect law firms with prospective clients who are actively searching for legal representation.

seoWebsiteAuditImage.alt: Local keyword research dashboard for a personal injury law firm showing search volume, competitor analysis, and SEO opportunities.
seoWebsiteAuditImage.title: Local Keyword Research and Competitive Analysis
seoWebsiteAuditImage.description: Professional SEO dashboard illustrating local keyword research and competitor analysis for a personal injury law firm. The visual highlights search volume, keyword difficulty, competitor rankings, and keyword opportunities that help improve local search visibility, increase organic traffic, and attract qualified legal clients.
seoWebsiteAuditImage.caption: Local keyword research and competitive analysis help law firms target high-value searches, outperform competitors, and generate more qualified client leads.

keywordResearchImage.alt: On-page SEO dashboard for a law firm showing title tags, meta descriptions, schema markup, and website optimization score.
keywordResearchImage.title: On-Page SEO and Website Optimization for Law Firms
keywordResearchImage.description: Professional on-page SEO dashboard illustrating website optimization for a law firm, including title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, schema markup, internal linking, and content optimization. The visual demonstrates how technical and on-page SEO improvements enhance search rankings, user experience, and organic lead generation.
keywordResearchImage.caption: Comprehensive on-page SEO optimization helps law firms improve search visibility, website performance, and attract more qualified legal clients.

onPageOptimizationImage.alt: Google Business Profile dashboard for a law firm showing profile optimization, reviews, and local search performance metrics.
onPageOptimizationImage.title: Google Business Profile Management for Law Firms
onPageOptimizationImage.description: Professional Google Business Profile management dashboard for a law firm featuring profile optimization, customer reviews, business updates, and local search performance. The visual demonstrates how an optimized Google Business Profile improves local visibility, builds credibility, increases client engagement, and drives qualified leads.
onPageOptimizationImage.caption: Effective Google Business Profile management helps law firms improve local visibility, earn client trust, and generate more qualified inquiries.

technicalSeoImage.alt: SEO-optimized legal content editor for a personal injury law firm with keyword analysis, content structure, and optimization score.
technicalSeoImage.title: Legal Content Development for Law Firm SEO
technicalSeoImage.description: Professional legal content development interface showcasing SEO-optimized service page creation for a personal injury law firm. The visual highlights keyword optimization, content structure, metadata, and on-page SEO best practices that improve search rankings, increase organic traffic, and attract qualified legal clients.
technicalSeoImage.caption: Strategic legal content development helps law firms improve search visibility, strengthen authority, and generate more qualified client leads through SEO.

localSeoMapPackImage.alt: Law firm citation building and NAP consistency dashboard improving local SEO rankings across legal directories.
localSeoMapPackImage.title: Law Firm Citation Building and NAP Consistency Services
localSeoMapPackImage.description: Professional law firm local SEO illustration showcasing citation building, NAP consistency, legal directory listings, Google Business Profile optimization, and local search performance. The visual highlights how consistent business information strengthens online authority, improves local rankings, and generates more qualified client inquiries.
localSeoMapPackImage.caption: Citation building and NAP consistency help law firms improve local search visibility, strengthen online authority, and attract more qualified clients

contentDevelopmentImage.alt: Law firm link building and domain authority dashboard showing backlink growth, referring domains, and improved SEO performance.
contentDevelopmentImage.title: Link Building and Domain Authority for Law Firms
contentDevelopmentImage.description: Professional SEO dashboard illustrating link building and domain authority growth for a law firm. The visual highlights quality backlinks, referring domains, trusted legal directories, and local authority signals that improve search rankings, strengthen website credibility, and increase organic client acquisition.
contentDevelopmentImage.caption: Quality link building and stronger domain authority help law firms improve search rankings, increase online credibility, and attract more qualified clients.

offPageSeoImage.alt: Technical SEO audit dashboard for a law firm showing Core Web Vitals, site health, crawl issues, and website optimization metrics.
offPageSeoImage.title: Technical SEO Audit and Remediation for Law Firms
offPageSeoImage.description: Professional technical SEO audit dashboard illustrating website health analysis for a law firm, including Core Web Vitals, crawlability, indexability, page speed, mobile optimization, structured data, and broken link remediation. The visual demonstrates how technical SEO improvements enhance search visibility, website performance, and organic lead generation.
offPageSeoImage.caption: Technical SEO audits identify and resolve website issues, helping law firms improve performance, search rankings, and user experience.

askEngineOptimizationImage.alt: Monthly SEO reporting dashboard for a law firm showing keyword rankings, organic traffic, leads, conversions, and performance trends.
askEngineOptimizationImage.title: Monthly SEO Reporting and Performance Tracking
askEngineOptimizationImage.description: Professional SEO reporting dashboard displaying monthly performance metrics for a law firm, including keyword rankings, organic traffic, lead generation, conversion rates, landing page performance, and strategic recommendations. The visual demonstrates transparent reporting that helps measure SEO success and guide future optimization efforts.
askEngineOptimizationImage.caption: Monthly SEO reporting gives law firms clear insights into rankings, traffic, leads, and overall performance to support continuous growth.
